full_text:
Gongchou Cheng 公仇稱
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongchou Cheng (公仇稱). Sent by Sun Jian to maintain supplies during war against Dong Zhuo. Gongchou Cheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
